category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a command-line OpenStreetMap data processor; official OpenStreetMap wiki describes Osmosis as processing OSM data with pluggable read/write/filter components.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is osmosis; official OpenStreetMap wiki and GitHub README use the project name Osmosis.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official OpenStreetMap wiki Osmosis page; official GitHub README says the wiki is the main entry point for documentation and Detailed Usage is the main reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/openstreetmap/osmosis, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a CLI OpenStreetMap data processor; official GitHub README describes a Java command-line application for processing OpenStreetMap data.
